name: Simon-128 Cipher
description: A bit-serial Simon-128/128 lightweight block cipher (fixed zero key), adapted from Secure-Embedded-Systems' Tiny Tapeout tt08-simon (Apache-2.0, commit 6450fdc), taken spec -> lint -> sim -> GDS on sky130hd entirely through the platform.
highlights: Full flow to GDSII on sky130hd (OpenROAD/ORFS)
Timing met: WNS 0.0 ns; 1027 std cells; 2.39 mW
Self-checking TB verifies two published Simon-128 known-answer vectors -- TEST PASSED
source_note: Cipher RTL adapted verbatim from Secure-Embedded-Systems/tt08-simon (Apache-2.0); original self-checking TB checks the project's published Simon-128 known-answer vectors; authored by dogfooding SiliconCrew locally.
